action.reasoning: Observation: best=0.6068 (alpha=2.5/beta=1.2, full-test success_rate=0.8733, dist=337.9m, room success=0.8). Last iter failed due to predict.py truncation + TypeError (glob module called as function instead of glob.glob). Proxy runs ~0.77. Analysis: The dijkstra-based global target (util**beta)/(dist**alpha+1) + next-hop on node graph remains strong 0-param frontier planner (real ExplorationEnv, uses obs nodes/utilities/neighbors, fully contract compliant). Root cause was workspace truncation of get_maps + missing glob.glob. No benefit to further param changes without validation; reuse best params. Decision: Overwrite with COMPACT non-truncated COMPLETE predict.py (proven select_waypoint, robust get_maps preferring eval_config.json then maps_eval glob then proxy fallback, full run_evaluation with per-ep try/except, strict per_type init for all keys, success-only distances, exact JSON contract + correct exploration_score=(1/N)sum(S_i*300.0/d_i), always write output). Update train.py to best params + v28 desc. Run train+predict (should get full 150-map eval), submit_eval on checkpoint.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output output.json
